title: Skill Tree (RPG Series)
description: ⭐️ Choose your path - Skills that shape your class
body:
![Skill Tree](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/PjDhruSC/images/3c3a3fab49d7b20d698f54143c148101b1a93bf8.png)

## ⭐️ Choose your path - Skills that shape your class

### ✨ Discover more of the RPG Series

[![Archers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XIpMGI6r/images/cd19a95a79f1157b33f31818aa615a280b206912.png "Archers")](https://modrinth.com/mod/archers "")
[![Paladins](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XIpMGI6r/images/3f19359bfd7521ba17bec818f125e87e09ef277e.png "Paladins")](https://modrinth.com/mod/paladins-and-priests "")
[![Wizards](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XIpMGI6r/images/a7da965aa108daf95c10448c01423be49ce2338d.png "Wizards")](https://modrinth.com/mod/wizards "")
[![Jewelry](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XIpMGI6r/images/747102d582732b8defa50a2c925c7d5a6f87d009.png "Jewelry")](https://modrinth.com/mod/jewelry "")
[![Rogues](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XIpMGI6r/images/278d8c941af6dc763cf714b9f36f8b8366a60eb9.png "Rogues")](https://modrinth.com/mod/rogues-and-warriors "")
[![Relics](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XIpMGI6r/images/a62c4eb9400d2ee8349078125ba0ab8b22c4424e.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/relics-rpg "Relics")

# 📦 Installation

### Required

- Pufferfish Skills
- Archers (RPG Series)
- Paladins & Priests (RPG Series)
- Rogues & Warriors (RPG Series)
- Wizards (RPG Series)

# 🌴 Features

Explore a whole new skill tree, with 100+ unique nodes, for RPG Series classes.

*   Specialise each of them into offensive or defensive direction
*   Spell modifiers skill nodes - some skills modify existing spells to make them stronger in unique ways
*   Passive spell skill node - some skills give you passive abilities to combine your existing spells with

Gain skill points by gathering XP, to unlock the skills. XP is shared between team members.

![Skill Tree](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/PjDhruSC/images/46c9b4f1b543fe3d6c01a42d693c190a9df2eb84.png)
## ↔️ Meaningful choices

Instead of a straight forward unlock path that makes you OP, this mod offers unique choices for specialising.

![Frost Nova](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/PjDhruSC/images/5cba331f5383a4afd40e313b6d0efb38704bfc14.png)

## 🐣 Spell modifiers

Some of the skill choices modify existing spells you own, transforming the way you play or interact with others.

![Judgement](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/PjDhruSC/images/e5215e316aae9489d2e97b9512dd62d4beb7c0eb.png) ![Blood Barrage](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/PjDhruSC/images/d1e1c60936ea26cc8f32066a8203b711f2d392d3.png)

## 🌟 Passive spells

Obtain new passive spells that are always with you. These come with various triggers, effects and combat integrations.

![Arcane Ward](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/PjDhruSC/images/5134f6a7da0d22bb80bb275a2dc3e1cff8b1f01a.png)

![Ambush](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/PjDhruSC/images/0ea255c3341a0e6fa8b931a048035fe8d25a734c.png)

![Blazing Speed](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/PjDhruSC/images/74e3c1bad4f9245076e07f9a0de56a2841bbc765.png)

## 💔 Reset your tree

Want to get rid of your current build? - Obtain and use an Orb of Oblivion, to reset and refund points spent on the skill tree.

![Reset Orb](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1261/840/orb_of_oblivion_1_shadow-png.png)

# Designed for multiplayer

Create your own RPG server. Using our promo code gets you cheaper prices and also supports us.

[![Get a server](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/88e9c178-fe70-4122-8b9b-97d2feb48c2a.png)](https://bisecthosting.com/RPG_SERIES)
